title: Part 5 – Entraînement 1 : temps verbaux & voix passive
instructions: Choisissez le mot ou le groupe de mots qui complète correctement chaque phrase.

items.sentence: The new branch ____ officially opened by the CEO last Thursday.
items.explanation: "last Thursday" indique le prétérit. Voix passive : "was opened".

items.sentence: All orders ____ processed within two business days of receipt.
items.explanation: Sujet pluriel "All orders" + présent simple passif : "are processed".

items.sentence: The quarterly figures ____ not yet been reviewed by the finance committee.
items.explanation: "not yet" + present perfect avec sujet pluriel : "have not yet been reviewed".

items.sentence: By the time the client arrives, the report ____ ready.
items.explanation: Futur dans une phrase temporelle avec "by the time" : "will be ready".

items.sentence: The manager ____ the team about the changes before they took effect.
items.explanation: "before they took effect" : action passée → prétérit "notified".

items.sentence: New safety procedures ____ put in place following last month's inspection.
items.explanation: Résultat présent d'une action passée récente → present perfect passif : "have been put in place".

items.sentence: The client ____ waiting for over thirty minutes when the meeting finally started.
items.explanation: Action en cours avant un moment passé → past perfect continu : "had been waiting".

items.sentence: Staff are reminded that personal devices ____ not be used during client presentations.
items.explanation: Règle ou recommandation forte : "should not be used".

items.sentence: The shipment ____ arrive tomorrow if everything goes according to plan.
Employees ____ to submit their timesheets by noon every Friday.
items.explanation: Sujet pluriel + voix passive : "are expected to submit".
